## MoldId type

Globally unique mold identifier (composite) Format: "sourceId.baseMoldId" Must contain exactly one dot separator Pattern: /^\[a-zA-Z0-9\_-\]+<!-- -->.<!-- -->\[a-zA-Z0-9\_-\]+$/

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type MoldId = Brand<string, 'MoldId'>;
```
